title: Appraisers of Personal and Business Property
description: Appraise and estimate the fair value of tangible personal or business property, such as jewelry, art, antiques, collectibles, and equipment. May also appraise land.

tasks.text: Write descriptions of the property being appraised.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine the appropriate type of valuation to make, such as fair market, replacement, or liquidation, based on the needs of the property owner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document physical characteristics of property such as measurements, quality, and design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate the value of property based on comparisons to recent sales, estimated cost to reproduce, and anticipated property income streams.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and record data on sales of comparable property using specialized software, internet searches, or personal records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Write and submit appraisal reports for property, such as jewelry, art, antiques, collectibles, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Create and maintain a database of completed appraisals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that property matches legal descriptions or certifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Update appraisals when property has been improved, damaged, or has otherwise changed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Testify in court as to the value of a piece of tangible property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend loan amounts based on the value of property being used as collateral.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
